homepage.introBody: Born between the Loire and Brittany, on the gentle slopes of the Muscadet Nantais, AB Initio is a project of artisanal, living wines. Folle Blanche, Melon de Bourgogne, Chardonnay, Gamay: organically-farmed vines rooted in granite, schist and orthogneiss, hand-picked and respectfully vinified in terracotta amphoras or underground concrete vats. The conviction that nothing happens without reason.
homepage.trustEyebrow: Proud to work with people & places that share our passion
homepage.trustLink: Find our wines in France and beyond →
homepage.pullQuote: « Nothing happens without reason. Every wine is the fruit of an intention, a terroir, a moment caught. »
homepage.storyHeading: From the beginning, for the love of wine
homepage.storyBody: AB Initio was officially born in 2020, on the land of the Muscadet Nantais, between the Loire and Brittany. But the story began long before — a series of pivotal encounters, profound moments that changed the course of a life.

legalPage.title: Legal notice
legalPage.ipBody: All content on this website — texts, images, photographs, illustrations, logos — is the exclusive property of SAS AB INITIO or its partners, and is protected under French and international intellectual property law. Any reproduction, representation, modification or partial use is prohibited without prior written consent.

privacyPage.title: Privacy policy
privacyPage.dataBody: This website uses traffic analytics tools to improve your experience. These tools are subject to your consent via the cookie banner displayed on your first visit.
privacyPage.cookiesBody: This website uses the following cookies, activated only after your consent:
privacyPage.cookiesGA: Google Analytics (Google LLC): audience measurement, pages visited, visit duration. Anonymised data.
privacyPage.cookiesClarity: Microsoft Clarity (Microsoft): navigation behaviour analysis (clicks, scrolling). Anonymised data.
privacyPage.cookiesPref: You can update your preferences at any time by clicking the cookie icon at the bottom of the page.
privacyPage.cookiesNecessary: Cookies strictly necessary for the website to function do not require consent.
privacyPage.rightsBody: Under the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR — EU Regulation 2016/679), you have the right to access, rectify, delete and port your data, as well as the right to object to and restrict its processing. To exercise these rights, contact us at: contact@abinitio-wines.com
privacyPage.updatesBody: This policy may be updated at any time. Last updated: April 2026.
